concepts.label: Walking
concepts.definition: Moving on foot at a moderate pace by alternately setting each foot forward

concepts.label: Running
concepts.definition: Moving rapidly on foot with both feet temporarily leaving the ground during each stride

concepts.label: Sprinting
concepts.definition: Running at maximum speed over a short distance

concepts.label: Jogging
concepts.definition: Running at a slow, steady pace as a form of aerobic exercise

concepts.label: Jumping
concepts.definition: Propelling oneself upward or forward by a sudden muscular effort

concepts.label: Leaping
concepts.definition: Jumping with a long, bounding motion

concepts.label: Hopping
concepts.definition: Moving by jumping on one foot or with both feet together

concepts.label: Climbing
concepts.definition: Moving up, down, or across something using hands and feet

concepts.label: Crawling
concepts.definition: Moving on hands and knees or by dragging the body along the ground

concepts.label: Creeping
concepts.definition: Moving slowly and carefully, especially on hands and knees

concepts.label: Swimming
concepts.definition: Moving through water by coordinated movement of the limbs

concepts.label: Diving
concepts.definition: Plunging head first into water or descending underwater

concepts.label: Floating
concepts.definition: Remaining suspended in water or air without sinking

concepts.label: Flying
concepts.definition: Moving through the air under one's own power or in an aircraft

concepts.label: Gliding
concepts.definition: Moving smoothly and continuously through air or over a surface

concepts.label: Soaring
concepts.definition: Flying at a high altitude without flapping wings or using engine power

concepts.label: Driving
concepts.definition: Operating and controlling the direction and speed of a motor vehicle

concepts.label: Riding
concepts.definition: Sitting on and controlling the movement of an animal or vehicle

concepts.label: Sailing
concepts.definition: Traveling in a boat using wind power captured by sails

concepts.label: Rowing
concepts.definition: Propelling a boat through water using oars

concepts.label: Paddling
concepts.definition: Propelling a boat using a paddle with broad blade

concepts.label: Skating
concepts.definition: Moving smoothly over a surface using skates

concepts.label: Skiing
concepts.definition: Moving over snow on skis, typically as a sport or recreation

concepts.label: Snowboarding
concepts.definition: Sliding downhill on snow while standing on a snowboard

concepts.label: Skateboarding
concepts.definition: Riding and performing tricks on a skateboard

concepts.label: Eating
concepts.definition: Consuming food by chewing and swallowing

concepts.label: Drinking
concepts.definition: Taking liquid into the mouth and swallowing it

concepts.label: Chewing
concepts.definition: Working food in the mouth with the teeth

concepts.label: Swallowing
concepts.definition: Causing food or drink to pass down the throat

concepts.label: Tasting
concepts.definition: Perceiving the flavor of food or drink

concepts.label: Sleeping
concepts.definition: A naturally recurring state of mind and body rest

concepts.label: Dreaming
concepts.definition: Experiencing sequences of images and emotions during sleep

concepts.label: Napping
concepts.definition: Taking a short sleep during the day

concepts.label: Resting
concepts.definition: Ceasing work or movement in order to relax or recover

concepts.label: Relaxing
concepts.definition: Making or becoming less tense or anxious

concepts.label: Washing
concepts.definition: Cleaning with water and typically soap

concepts.label: Bathing
concepts.definition: Washing the body in a bath or shower

concepts.label: Showering
concepts.definition: Washing under a spray of water

concepts.label: Brushing
concepts.definition: Cleaning or grooming with a brush

concepts.label: Shaving
concepts.definition: Cutting hair close to the skin with a razor

concepts.label: Cooking
concepts.definition: Preparing food by heating and combining ingredients

concepts.label: Baking
concepts.definition: Cooking food by dry heat in an oven

concepts.label: Frying
concepts.definition: Cooking food in hot fat or oil

concepts.label: Boiling
concepts.definition: Cooking in water at 100 degrees Celsius

concepts.label: Steaming
concepts.definition: Cooking with the steam from boiling water

concepts.label: Grilling
concepts.definition: Cooking food on a metal framework over fire

concepts.label: Roasting
concepts.definition: Cooking food with dry heat in an oven or over fire

concepts.label: Cleaning
concepts.definition: Making something free of dirt, marks, or mess

concepts.label: Sweeping
concepts.definition: Cleaning a floor with a broom

concepts.label: Mopping
concepts.definition: Cleaning a floor with a wet mop

concepts.label: Wiping
concepts.definition: Cleaning by rubbing with a cloth or similar

concepts.label: Scrubbing
concepts.definition: Cleaning by rubbing hard with a brush

concepts.label: Organizing
concepts.definition: Arranging items in a systematic way

concepts.label: Sorting
concepts.definition: Arranging items according to type or characteristics

concepts.label: Purchasing
concepts.definition: Buying something by paying for it

concepts.label: Selecting
concepts.definition: Choosing from a number of alternatives

concepts.label: Working
concepts.definition: Engaging in physical or mental activity to achieve a result

concepts.label: Studying
concepts.definition: Acquiring knowledge through reading and research

concepts.label: Playing
concepts.definition: Engaging in activity for enjoyment and recreation

concepts.label: Exercising
concepts.definition: Engaging in physical activity to improve health

concepts.label: Reading
concepts.definition: Looking at and understanding written words

concepts.label: Writing
concepts.definition: Marking letters, words, or symbols on a surface

concepts.label: Drawing
concepts.definition: Creating pictures with pencil, pen, or similar tools

concepts.label: Painting
concepts.definition: Creating pictures using paint and brushes

concepts.label: Talking
concepts.definition: Speaking to communicate or express thoughts

concepts.label: Conversing
concepts.definition: Engaging in spoken exchange with others

concepts.label: Whispering
concepts.definition: Speaking very softly using breath without vocal cords

concepts.label: Shouting
concepts.definition: Speaking or calling out very loudly

concepts.label: Listening
concepts.definition: Paying attention to sound or what someone is saying

concepts.label: Singing
concepts.definition: Making musical sounds with the voice

concepts.label: Humming
concepts.definition: Making a continuous low sound with closed lips

concepts.label: Whistling
concepts.definition: Making a shrill sound by forcing breath through pursed lips

concepts.label: Building
concepts.definition: Constructing something by assembling parts or materials

concepts.label: Repairing
concepts.definition: Fixing something that is damaged or broken

concepts.label: Assembling
concepts.definition: Putting together parts to create a whole

concepts.label: Waving
concepts.definition: Moving the hand back and forth as a greeting or signal

concepts.label: Shaking
concepts.definition: Grasping another person's hand in greeting

concepts.label: Nodding
concepts.definition: Moving the head up and down as acknowledgment

concepts.label: Bowing
concepts.definition: Bending the head or body as a greeting or sign of respect

concepts.label: Saying goodbye
concepts.definition: Taking leave of someone when parting

concepts.label: Assisting
concepts.definition: Giving support or aid to someone

concepts.label: Supporting
concepts.definition: Giving assistance or encouragement to someone

concepts.label: Sharing
concepts.definition: Giving a portion of something to others

concepts.label: Receiving
concepts.definition: Accepting or taking something that is offered

concepts.label: Offering
concepts.definition: Presenting something for acceptance or rejection

concepts.label: Apologizing
concepts.definition: Expressing regret for a mistake or offense

concepts.label: Forgiving
concepts.definition: Pardoning someone for an offense or mistake

concepts.label: Arguing
concepts.definition: Giving reasons for or against something in dispute

concepts.label: Agreeing
concepts.definition: Having the same opinion about something

concepts.label: Hugging
concepts.definition: Putting arms around someone as affection or greeting

concepts.label: Embracing
concepts.definition: Holding someone closely in one's arms

concepts.label: Kissing
concepts.definition: Touching with the lips as a sign of love or greeting

concepts.label: Patting
concepts.definition: Touching gently with the flat of the hand

concepts.label: Stroking
concepts.definition: Moving the hand gently over a surface

concepts.label: Laughing
concepts.definition: Making sounds expressing amusement or joy

concepts.label: Giggling
concepts.definition: Laughing lightly in a nervous or silly way

concepts.label: Smiling
concepts.definition: Forming a pleased or friendly expression

concepts.label: Crying
concepts.definition: Shedding tears as expression of emotion

concepts.label: Comforting
concepts.definition: Giving consolation or reassurance to someone

concepts.label: Consoling
concepts.definition: Giving comfort to someone in distress

concepts.label: Encouraging
concepts.definition: Giving support or confidence to someone

concepts.label: Large
concepts.definition: Of considerable or relatively great size

concepts.label: Enormous
concepts.definition: Very large in size or quantity

concepts.label: Giant
concepts.definition: Of very great size or force

concepts.label: Small
concepts.definition: Of limited size or below average dimensions

concepts.label: Microscopic
concepts.definition: So small as to be visible only with a microscope

concepts.label: Weightless
concepts.definition: Having no weight or very little weight

concepts.label: Warm
concepts.definition: Having or giving off a moderate degree of heat

concepts.label: Wet
concepts.definition: Covered or saturated with water or liquid

concepts.label: Damp
concepts.definition: Slightly wet in an unpleasant way

concepts.label: Hard
concepts.definition: Solid and difficult to bend, cut, or break

concepts.label: Soft
concepts.definition: Easy to press, bend, or cut

concepts.label: Firm
concepts.definition: Having a solid structure that resists pressure

concepts.label: Rough
concepts.definition: Having an uneven or irregular surface

concepts.label: Smooth
concepts.definition: Having an even surface without bumps

concepts.label: Sharp
concepts.definition: Having a pointed edge or tip

concepts.label: Fast
concepts.definition: Moving or capable of moving at high speed

concepts.label: Quick
concepts.definition: Moving fast or happening in short time

concepts.label: Rapid
concepts.definition: Happening in a short time or at fast pace

concepts.label: Swift
concepts.definition: Moving or capable of moving at great speed

concepts.label: New
concepts.definition: Not existing before; recently made or created

concepts.label: Old
concepts.definition: Having lived or existed for a long time

concepts.label: Young
concepts.definition: Having lived for a relatively short time

concepts.label: Clean
concepts.definition: Free from dirt, marks, or stains

concepts.label: Overflowing
concepts.definition: So full that contents spill over

concepts.label: Broken
concepts.definition: Having been damaged and no longer working

concepts.label: Inside
concepts.definition: In or into the interior of something

concepts.label: Above
concepts.definition: At a higher level than something else

concepts.label: Below
concepts.definition: At a lower level than something else

concepts.label: City
concepts.definition: A large town with important buildings and facilities

concepts.label: Town
concepts.definition: A built-up area smaller than a city

concepts.label: Village
concepts.definition: A small community in a rural area

concepts.label: Country
concepts.definition: Rural areas away from towns and cities

concepts.label: Countryside
concepts.definition: Rural areas with fields and farms

concepts.label: Field
concepts.definition: Open area of land for farming

concepts.label: Beach
concepts.definition: Sandy or pebbly shore by the sea

concepts.label: Shore
concepts.definition: Land along the edge of water

concepts.label: Valley
concepts.definition: Low area between hills or mountains

concepts.label: Lake
concepts.definition: Large body of water surrounded by land

concepts.label: Island
concepts.definition: Piece of land surrounded by water

concepts.label: Street
concepts.definition: Public road in city or town

concepts.label: Path
concepts.definition: Way or track laid down for walking

concepts.label: Sunrise
concepts.definition: The sun appearing above the horizon in the morning

concepts.label: Sunset
concepts.definition: The sun disappearing below the horizon in the evening

concepts.label: Dawn
concepts.definition: The first appearance of light in the morning

concepts.label: Twilight
concepts.definition: The soft glowing light when sun is below horizon

concepts.label: High tide
concepts.definition: The highest level reached by sea water

concepts.label: Low tide
concepts.definition: The lowest level reached by sea water

concepts.label: Earthquake
concepts.definition: Sudden violent shaking of the ground

concepts.label: Volcano
concepts.definition: Mountain with opening to molten rock below

concepts.label: Flood
concepts.definition: Overflow of water onto normally dry land

concepts.label: Avalanche
concepts.definition: Mass of snow sliding down mountainside

concepts.label: Landslide
concepts.definition: Mass of earth sliding down slope

concepts.label: Hurricane
concepts.definition: Violent tropical storm with strong winds

concepts.label: Rainbow
concepts.definition: Arc of colors formed in sky by sunlight and rain

concepts.label: Aurora
concepts.definition: Natural light display in polar regions

concepts.label: Eclipse
concepts.definition: Obscuring of light from celestial body

concepts.label: Meteor
concepts.definition: Shooting star burning up in atmosphere

concepts.label: Comet
concepts.definition: Celestial object with tail of gas and dust

concepts.label: Early
concepts.definition: Before the usual or expected time

concepts.label: Late
concepts.definition: After the expected or usual time

concepts.label: On time
concepts.definition: At the expected or planned time

concepts.label: Morning
concepts.definition: The early part of the day

concepts.label: Afternoon
concepts.definition: The time from noon to evening

concepts.label: Evening
concepts.definition: The latter part of the day

concepts.label: Night
concepts.definition: The dark hours between sunset and sunrise

concepts.label: Duration
concepts.definition: The length of time something lasts

concepts.label: Moment
concepts.definition: A very brief period of time

concepts.label: Instant
concepts.definition: An extremely short period of time

concepts.label: Temporary
concepts.definition: Lasting for only a limited time

concepts.label: Truth
concepts.definition: That which is true or in accordance with fact

concepts.label: Justice
concepts.definition: Fair treatment in accordance with moral rights

concepts.label: Freedom
concepts.definition: The power to act without constraint

concepts.label: Peace
concepts.definition: A state of harmony and absence of conflict

concepts.label: War
concepts.definition: Armed conflict between states or groups

concepts.label: Violence
concepts.definition: Behavior involving physical force to harm

concepts.label: Kindness
concepts.definition: The quality of being friendly and considerate

concepts.label: Happiness
concepts.definition: The feeling of joy or contentment

concepts.label: Sadness
concepts.definition: The feeling of sorrow or unhappiness

concepts.label: Joy
concepts.definition: A feeling of great pleasure and happiness

concepts.label: Sorrow
concepts.definition: Deep distress caused by loss or disappointment

concepts.label: Courage
concepts.definition: The ability to face danger or difficulty

concepts.label: Hope
concepts.definition: Expectation and desire for positive outcome

concepts.label: Luck
concepts.definition: Success or failure apparently by chance

concepts.label: Destiny
concepts.definition: Events that will happen in the future

concepts.label: Dream
concepts.definition: Series of thoughts during sleep or cherished aspiration

concepts.label: Idea
concepts.definition: Thought or conception in the mind

concepts.label: Knowledge
concepts.definition: Information and understanding gained through experience

concepts.label: Wisdom
concepts.definition: The quality of having experience and good judgment

concepts.label: Intelligence
concepts.definition: The ability to learn and understand

concepts.label: Stupidity
concepts.definition: Lack of intelligence or common sense

concepts.label: Clarity
concepts.definition: Easy to understand or see through

concepts.label: Mystery
concepts.definition: Something difficult to understand or explain

concepts.label: Movement
concepts.definition: The act of changing physical location or position

concepts.label: Motion
concepts.definition: The action or process of moving

concepts.label: Acceleration
concepts.definition: Increase in speed or rate of change

concepts.label: Transportation
concepts.definition: System of moving people or goods

concepts.label: Vehicle
concepts.definition: Machine used for transporting people or goods

concepts.label: Train
concepts.definition: Series of connected vehicles on rails

concepts.label: Fire
concepts.definition: Combustion process producing heat and light

concepts.label: Earth
concepts.definition: Soil or the planet we live on

concepts.label: Sun
concepts.definition: Star providing light and heat to Earth

concepts.label: Gravity
concepts.definition: Force that attracts objects toward Earth

concepts.label: Energy
concepts.definition: Power derived from physical or chemical resources

concepts.label: Power
concepts.definition: Ability to do work or cause change

concepts.label: Health
concepts.definition: State of physical and mental well-being

concepts.label: Life
concepts.definition: Condition distinguishing animals and plants from inorganic matter

concepts.label: Balance
concepts.definition: Even distribution of weight or stability
